chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-360 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing 1. For order on CMA No. 22023/2024 (Urgent/A) 2. For hearing of main case 14-03-2025 Mr. Muhammad Aizaz Ahmed Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General 1. Urgency granted. 2. Per learned counsel the Petitioner shall seek recourse before the statutory hierarchy for adjudication, hence, this petition may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad PS
